purpose: Assesses the probability of systemic CRE-banking crisis by decomposing it into the conjunction of 5 independent conditions that must all hold simultaneously
current_assessment: Joint probability ~3-8% even with generous positive correlation. Each condition has moderate individual probability but conjunction requirement dramatically reduces systemic probability. However a single trigger (recession) could make multiple conditions true simultaneously violating partial-independence
limitations: Partial-independence assumption is the key vulnerability: recession could trigger correlated failure of multiple conditions
Individual condition probabilities are themselves uncertain estimates
Does not capture speed of transition from benign to crisis state
